title: Function return types should be consistent with their type hint
description: Ensures that the return type of a function is consistent with its type hint.
impact: Potential runtime errors or incorrect behavior
recommendation: Ensure function return type matches its type hint

noncompliant.description: Function returning integer while type hint indicates int type

compliant.description: Function returning list of integers, matching type hint

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent function return types can lead to unexpected behavior, errors, or violations of the type contract.
how_to_fix: Update the function return type to match its actual return value.

metadata.title: Function return types should be consistent with their type hint
